item.name: Niikwerepi Bass
item.description:
A vigorous bass species that thrives in the currents of Niikwerepi, providing anglers with a great deal of sport.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Found up and down the length of Niikwerepi, this pungent fish is ill-suited for consumption. On the other hand, its vigor and stamina make it a prime target for veteran anglers seeking a worthy challenge.
